title: Norvach
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Norvach''''' was a pair of Imperial [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The freighters carried toxic waste in the cargo transfer area above [[Bofa II]], where new surveillance probes for the [[Relentless (Sunaj IV)|''Relentless'']] were to be delivered. The freighters were both destroyed by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] in a [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''
